00e2ba1144ea73da99f20c3dfb330ad6671c944c.reason: os.CreateTemp creates the temp file with mode 0600, but the code explicitly widens it to 0644 via os.Chmod(tmp.Name(), 0o644) before renaming it into place as the on-disk cache file. This makes the triage-cache.json file world-readable, exceeding the 0600 least-privilege permission the rule requires. The change is unconditional and always executed on every Save() call (line 101), with no compensating access-control check elsewhere in the function.
